title: PR #414 + 30-Epoch Cosine TTT (1.0988 BPB)
body:
## Summary

- **val_bpb: 1.0988** (post-TTT, stride-64 sliding window eval)
- **Artifact size: 15,900,191 bytes** (under 16MB)
- 8xH100 SXM, seed=1337

## Technique

30-epoch cosine pre-eval Test-Time Training (TTT) on the PR #414 consensus stack. After int6 quantization, the model is fine-tuned on validation data with cosine LR decay before the final sliding-window eval.

### TTT Details
- AdamW, base LR=0.0005, weight_decay=0.0
- Per-layer LR groups: `mlp.proj` 3x, `mlp.fc` 0.5x, others 1x
- Cosine LR schedule, grad clip 1.0
- DDP gradient sync (all_reduce AVG)
- 30 epochs, 3570 steps, ~836s on 8xH100

### Architecture (PR #414 stack)
- 11 layers, 512d, 8H, 4KV (GQA), relu²
- SmearGate + BigramHash, XSA on last 4 layers
- EMA(0.997) + Tight SWA, GPTQ-lite int6+zstd-22
- Sliding window eval (stride=64)

## Results

| Stage | val_loss | val_bpb |
|-------|----------|---------|
| Post-EMA (float) | 1.9433 | 1.1509 |
| Post-int6 roundtrip | 1.9577 | 1.1594 |
| **Post-TTT sliding (stride=64)** | **1.8553** | **1.0988** |

## Credits

- Base model and training: PR #414 by @signalrush
- TTT technique: PR #518 by @sofiabod, PR #672 by @andrewbaggio1
- SDPA fallback for non-FA3 environments
